name: New Easy 7 Grain Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Arrowhead Mills AM Seven Grain Cereal
5 1/2 cups Arrowhead Mills AM Whole Wheat Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over Seven Grain Cereal in a large mixing bowl.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
3. When cereal is lukewarm, add yeast and all remaining ingredients except 3 cups flour.
4. Beat vigorously for 2 minutes.
5. Work in remaining flour until a dough forms.
6. Divide dough into half and spread into the bottom of two oiled loaf pans.
7. Let rise until double.
8. Bake at 375°F for 35-45 minutes.
